games.id: 1v1-lol
games.name: 1v1 .lol
games.category: Action, Multiplayer
games.author: JustPlay.LOL
games.description: 1v1.LOL is a fast, competitive third‑person shooter where players build structures and battle in 1v1 duels, box fights, and mini battle‑royale modes. It mixes Fortnite‑style building with quick matchmaking and skill‑based gunplay.

games.category: Puzzle
games.author: Gabriele Cirulli
games.description: 2048 is a sliding‑tile number puzzle where you combine matching tiles to reach the 2048 block. It’s simple to learn but surprisingly strategic, requiring planning, pattern recognition, and careful movement choices.

games.id: adventure-capitalist
games.name: Adventure Capitalist
games.category: Strategy, Other
games.author: Hyper Hippo Games
games.description: Adventure Capitalist is an idle business simulator where you invest in increasingly profitable ventures to grow your empire automatically. Progression is exponential, with upgrades, managers, and even entire planets to unlock as your wealth skyrockets.

games.id: among-us
games.name: Among Us
games.category: Action, Multiplayer, Other
games.author: Fan Made / Unknown
games.description: This fan‑made version of Among Us recreates the core gameplay of completing tasks, identifying impostors, and surviving meetings in a simplified browser format. It keeps the social‑deduction feel while offering lightweight, fast matches without downloads.
